title: Document Object Model (DOM) Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the programming interface for HTML documents.

questions.question: Which programming language is primarily used to interact with and change the DOM in a browser?
The DOM represents an HTML page as what kind of structure?
Which object in JavaScript is the entry point to accessing and manipulating the DOM?
What is the difference between an Element and a Node in the DOM?
options: Elements are text; Nodes are tags.
An Element is a type of Node that specifically represents an HTML tag.
Nodes are only used for CSS styling.
There is no difference between them.
